title: Eternal Void 16x Crystalpvp
body:
### DARK THEMED TEXTURE PACK MADE FOR CRYSTALPVP AND SMPS
(DOESNT NEED OPTIFINE OR EMF+ETF)
## Features:
- Low,recolored fire
- small totem,the old totem recolored (dark)
- recolored trident texture and entity (dark)
- enchant glint recolored for items entities and armor (green)
- custom EZ crit particle (gray)
- Removed big smoke explosion and effect particles
- Removed Carved Pumpkin blur
- Custom items:shears,triden,totem of undying,elytra,broken elytra,end crystal,ender pearl,golden apple,netherite tools,netherite armor
- Outlined ores+Blue ancient debris
- Custom blocks:the outlined ores,respawn anchor,glowstone,cobweb,fire
- Red trapped chest
- Smaller xp orb
- Dark,transparent gui
- Recolored darker netherite armor
